title: Bridge Essay: Postdecisional Processing Delays in Metacognitive Monitoring After Traumatic Bra

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Postdecisional Processing Delays in Metacognitive Monitoring After Traumatic Brain Injury.**. J Head Trauma Rehabil.. PMID: 31246884. DOI: 10.1097/HTR.0000000000000509. OBJECTIVE: To document the process by which metacognitive judgments ("online" monitoring of one'sown cognitive performance during task completion) are made after traumatic brain injury (TBI). PARTICIPANTS: Sixteen community-dwelling adults with moderate to severe TBI and 16 matched healthy controls. DESIGN: Prospective, cross-sectional design. MEASURES: Metacognitive retrospective confidence judgments and reaction times were collected as participants performed ametamemory task. RESULTS: Adults
